caption: A man wearing a green t-shirt and a matching green baseball cap sits in a room filled with framed photos and clothing racks. His shirt features the text "I NEVER DO THAT" in a stylized white font. He wears black over-ear headphones and speaks into a professional black microphone positioned in front of him. In the background, several framed photographs hang on the wall, and a white mannequin wearing a white shirt stands near a clothing rack. Two logos are visible on the screen: a black circular logo with "THE" and a red logo that reads "THE RED ROOM PODCAST". As the sequence progresses, the man remains in the same position, shifting his facial expressions and slightly moving his head while speaking, suggesting a conversational flow during a recording session.
